parameters._comment_location: TODO: Set a region with Container Apps capacity (e.g. eastus, westeurope). Defaults to the resource group location if omitted.
parameters._comment_images: TODO: Replace <acr> with your registry login server once the ACR name is known. The workflow builds/pushes these tags. On a first bootstrap you may point at a public placeholder image until the real images exist.
parameters._comment_registry_creds: TODO: These enable the simplest ACR-admin-credentials path for a first deploy. Prefer a user-assigned managed identity with AcrPull and leave these empty. Never commit real values — pass them at deploy time (e.g. from the workflow) instead.
